arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano: Man Utd 'Prepare Bid' to Sign 'Elite' Star Amorim 'Loves'
arts.sum: Manchester United are preparing a new bid for Lecce defender Patrick Dorgu after seeing their initial proposal turned down.

arts.ttl: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer reveals Man Utd approach landed huge win in first game at new club
arts.sum: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer enjoyed a 4-1 win against Athletic Bilbao in his first game as Besiktas' new manager, with the ex-Manchester United boss making another instant impact

arts.ttl: Transfer news LIVE: Dibling heading to Germany, Antony set to depart Man utd
arts.sum: The January transfer market is now officially open, with clubs across Europe looking to get deals over the line to enhance their squads for the second half of the season. Teams are working...

arts.ttl: 'Always convinced' - Rangers are already well aware of Manchester United 'dangerman'
arts.sum: Amad Diallo will come up against former side Rangers in the Europa League this evening

arts.ttl: Preview of Man Utd v Rangers & review of Celtic v Young Boys
arts.sum: Phil Goodlad, Mark Critchley and Jamie Murphy look ahead to Rangers Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Diallo's rise from Rangers flop to Man Utd saviour
arts.sum: Tom English on Amad Diallo's rise from an underwhelming loan spell at Rangers to be a star at Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Real break 1bn euro barrier to top money league
arts.sum: Real Madrid become the first football club to generate more than 1bn euros in annual revenue, according to analysis by Deloitte.

arts.ttl: The Rangers loan that made Amad
arts.sum: Amad Diallo is proof that progress isn't linear.

arts.ttl: 'Really important' - Ruben Amorim fires clear Europa League warning to Manchester United squad
arts.sum: Man United take on Rangers in their penultimate Europa League league phase outing at Old Trafford on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: 'I demanded to leave Man Utd even though they wanted me to stay – I made a big mistake'
arts.sum: Despite Andrei Kanchelskis coming into his own in his last year as a Manchester United player, he famously revealed his desire to leave Old Trafford; a decision he'd come to regret
